sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19001" key="baqmoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαθμ-οειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n19001.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like steps,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:155" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">155</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.176B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.Alch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.176B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
